source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
WITH cust_stats AS (
  SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total
  FROM payment
  GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, cs.cnt, cs.total
FROM customer c
JOIN cust_stats cs ON c.customer_id = cs.customer_id
WHERE cs.total > 30
LIMIT 20
input.explain_output:
-- @id: Q56

-- @scenario: CTE + 多层联接
WITH cust_stats AS (
  SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(amount) AS total
  FROM payment
  GROUP BY customer_id
)
SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, cs.cnt, cs.total
FROM customer c
JOIN cust_stats cs ON c.customer_id = cs.customer_id
WHERE cs.total > 30
LIMIT 20;
